params.prompt: 3D rendered character still, cinematic studio lighting: a low-poly origami-style geometric fox ('Ræv'), faceted angular paper-crease panels forming her fur — warm amber-orange facets with snow-white muzzle, chest and tail-tip — sitting alert on a dark rocky ridge dusted with snow. Cool teal-and-indigo Scandinavian night sky behind her with a soft aurora borealis ribbon, fine snowflakes drifting. One bold accent color: warm amber-orange #ff9a3d, subtle volumetric amber rim light tracing her faceted edges. Premium award-winning 3D render, Pixar-quality character still, centered-right composition with generous negative space on the left for headline text.
